description: TDD guide agent enforces write-tests-first workflow

cases.prompt: I need to add a function that calculates the factorial of a number. Please help me implement it.
cases.description: Agent must suggest writing tests before implementation

cases.prompt: Add a UserService class that validates email addresses and stores users in a database.
cases.description: Agent must show test scaffolding before service implementation

cases.prompt: My existing test is failing: AssertionError: expected 42 but got 0. The function is supposed to sum an array.
cases.description: Agent helps make a failing test pass (GREEN step)
